TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pihapiw no Dipong a micalap to Taywan == Kadofah ko tataparang kinaira no Taywan to sakiriyar a lalan, pinaay semo'otay miheca pakayni adihayay papotalay tayni macacefis micalap mikowan, i 1895 miheca Simonoseki kasatelek no Mancin pakelac to Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato salawacay a kanatal to Dipong, nanoyaan sa macalap no Dipong ko Taywan 50 no mihecaan. Lalengatan lalood i Sino to Dipong ​Macowat ko Sino to Dipong i 1894 miheca, lalengatan to itiraay i Caosien a Tongsitang a demak, pasi Mancin to sapadama ko Caosien itiya, milongoc to Mancin sifo miocor to sofitay pipalineknek to fangafang, o Dipong sato sapidamaaw to Taisikan ko Dipong ato itiraay i Caosien a finawlan miocor to sofitay tayra i Caosien. ​​Paherek konini a demakan misawad ko sofitay no Mancin, nika o sakanga'ayaw no kacitodong kahiceraan malalood ato kanga'ayan no kicay no Dipong caay ka kahi misawad to Caosien, milongoc to Caosien to "pifalic to laloma'an a satao'", toloay romi'ad palasawaden ko polong no katatelekan to Mancin kitakit. Maraod ko tolo romi'ad, tangsol sa moocor to sofitay ko Dipong tayra i Caosien, mifelih to citodongay hongti no Caosien a pala salaloma'ay citodongay mikowan patireng to miingiray to Dipong, saka mapalasawad ko polong no katatelekan to Mancin kitakit, patorod to Dipong milaplap to sofitay no Mancin. ​​​Itiyaay tana mafana' tonini demak ko citodongay no Mancin a kakeridan ci Li Hongcang, palalefodan sato miocor to sofitay tayra i Pingyang, ato pakayra i tamina misera to sofitay talasekal no Caosien. I 1894 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad o Mancin ato Dipong itira i Fong kanatal no Caosien a malalood i riyar, lahengheng to ko pakotang saka Langat sato ko Sino a lalood. 8 folad 1 romi'ad, hongtiu no Mancin mihapiw to saka lalood to Dipong a tilid ​​Malengat to i kalalood itiya, pakayni rafasay 30 mihecaan a Ceciang onto, o satadamaanay ko Piyang sofitay no Mancin cingangan to "sakacecay i Asia" sanay, nika misi'ayaw to 30 miheca to Meiciisin a fa'elohay no Dipong a sofitay ato tamina i, o lefek to no Piyang sofitay. Saki sekal ato riyar a lalood, caayto pakafilo ko sofitay no Mancin mico'ay to sofitay no Dipong a honihoni tararikor, ikor no kalalood a Tiencangtay i, maemin to malikot, ikor sato a Mancin patangic hananay to masasitelek to Dipong. Sino katatelekan makelac ko Taywan Pengho ​Itiya i miheca 7 folad 17 romi'ad, o Dipong ato Mancin a dayhiw itira i Cungfanlo masasitelak "Dipong Mancin Sino katatelek", mihapiw to Sino lalood malaheci ko paherek. Saka tosa liyad masowal, o Congko mida'oc pakelac to Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato lawacay no Dipong a kasakanatal pafeli to Dipong. 5 folad 8 romi'ad, Dipong Mancin masasifalic to "Dipong Mancin Sino katatelek" pihayda a tilid, Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato lawacay no Dipong a kasakanatal sa'elin mala no Dipong to a sofal. ​​Nanoya pakelac to Taywan sanay a ratoh pakayni kalali'acaay, roma kitakit a li'acaay malo kasasowalen, talacowa caay ho ka fangcal ko kasasifana'an no Taywan syakay, o 'alomanay tamdaw caay ho kafana' to "Dipong" a kitakit. Pakatengil ko finawlan no Taywan tonini a ratoh i, pacekok a rarawraw calemcem. ​​​O kasasowasowal to no i niyaro'ay a tadamaanay tamdaw i, padinpo to kafafaw no Mancin ci Tang Jingsong, pakafana' to ao "Misatatad patireng to kitakit" sanay a kacingangan to sakapisiiked. Saka i 1985 miheca 5 folad 23 romi'ad mihapiw to "Taywan o nikapolongan kitakit saiked a hapiw", i 5 folad 25 romi'ad malaheci patireng to "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit". o congtong ci Tang Jingsong, micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia, o tatapangan no sofitay ci Liu Yongfu, patireng to kandaway lokedaw a fayfay, pamihecaan a ngangan o "Yongcin" sanay, talacowa no niyah o "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit" ko pitahidang, nika o no Mancin kitakit ko Taywan o saanay pinangan. Misa'icel ko Taywan tamdaw miliyang to pikowan no Dipong to Yosihide a lalood ​I 1895 miheca 5 folad 29 romi'ad, o hongti no Dipong ci Sirakawa-to Yosihisa mikerid to rafasay no 7000 tamdaw sofitay no Dipong talasekal i Auti micada to Taywan, oya "Yosihide lalood" miteka itiya, nanoyaan sa pakalowid, oya Taywan nikapolongan kitakit a kohetingay sofitay, caay pakalowid a tararikor mitena' i laloma'an no Taypi. I 6 folad 4 romi'ad, kafana'en ni Tang Jingsong o caacaay pakalowid to cikowangay sofitay no Dipong a mico'ay, nanoya mifalic to losid a mato'asay fafahiyan misalafii milaliw, ikor, oya micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia milosimet to dafong payso a milaliw. ​​Oya kakeridan ato tadamaanay kakeridan padoedo saan to milaliw to niyaro' no Taypi, oya i niyaro'ay to a sofitay awaayto ko kakeridan, oya sa a sofitay samatiya sato o mari'angay mitodoh a micefis to dafong, nanoya sararawraw sato ko tamdaw ko niyaro' no Taypi. ​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad, oya tadamaanay a tamdaw masa'opo milaoc miocor to tamdaw ci "Gu Xianrong" a dayhiw, mifohat to fawahan pacomod to sofitay no Dipong i niyaro', todong paherekan rarawraw no finawlan. Micada ko Dipong to Taypi i, toya miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad mipacakat to "Pitekaan mikowan a lisin". ​​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad pasitimol to ko sofitay no Dipong, malitemoh ko "Ngayngay a miliyangay, Payrang macodahay" a tamdaw miliyang itiya. toya miheca 8 folad 27 romi'ad cidemak to "Pakuasan a lalood", ira ko 8 a tatokian ko kasasitoc, i 28 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki malowid no sofitay to no Dipong. ​​​​​Ikor no lalood, oya kiemelay sofitay no Dipong, talacowa miliyang ko yiyong sofitay ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, kasatiwtiw no sakalalood caayto kafiloan. Toya miheca 10 folad mikerid ci Liu Yongfu to sofitay mitena' i niyaro' no Taynan, kafana'en ni Liu Yongfu ko malatoloay picomod no sofitay a mikiraromot, caay aca sato, sawad hanto ni Liu Yongfu ko sofitay i Taynan, milaliw a tayra i Xiamen no Congko. ​​​​​​Oya sato kakitakitaan no Taynan milecad to no Taypi micikeroh ocor to foksi no Inkiris ci Barclay aci Song Zhongjian maladayhiw, milongoc to sofitay no Dipong ka o rihadayay ko picomod to niyaro' no Taynan, mipadama to karihaday no finawlan. I 10 folad 21 folad, laheci sato ko picomod no sofitay no Dipong i Taynan, oya celak sanay ho a "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit" songila' sanay to a malafok. Pitekaan no picalap no Dipong ​Malasawad ko Taywan nikapolongan kitakit i, oya masahoracay a yiyong sofitay ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, talacowa ira ko kasasiwtoc nika awaay ko 'icel miliyang to sofitay no Dipong. O sarakatay a Taiwan sotoku ci Kabayama YuKen i 11 folad 18 folad pasi Kyoto miparatoh itiya : "Maeminay tomenak ko polong finawlan" sato. Mihapiw paherek no Yiwei lalood, paherek to 5 folad a lalood. ​​I 1896 miheca 2 folad 3 romi'ad, Taywan Sotoko mincenci paratoh to kasakitakit citodongay i Taywan, mihapiw to Taywan o "saka cecay nicalapan no Dipong a kitakit ko Taywan", na miteka tangasa 50 miheca ko "Picalap no Dipong a to'ek". ​​Mikawitay ci Wu Shengxian, Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay mitliday
S.PHON: == piħapiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦaɾap to~u tajwan == kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u tataparaŋ kinaira no~u tajwan to~u sakirijar a ɾaɾan, pinaaj səmo~uʡo~utaj miħəʦa pakajni aɬ~ɮiħajaj papo~utaɾaj tajni maʦaʦəfis miʦaɾap miko~uwan, i **** miħəʦa simo~uno~usəki kasatəɾək no~u manʦin pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u saɾawaʦaj a kanataɾ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~ujaan sa maʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u tajwan ** no~u miħəʦaan. ɾaɾəŋatan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i sino~u to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ *maʦo~uwat ko~u sino~u to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa, ɾaɾəŋatan to~u itiraaj i ʦao~usiən a to~uŋsitaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, pasi manʦin to~u sapaɬ~ɮama ko~u ʦao~usiən itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u manʦin sifo~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj pipaɾinəknək to~u faŋafaŋ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u taisikan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u itiraaj i ʦao~usiən a finawɾan mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən. **paħərək ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, nika o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kaħiʦəraan maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u kaŋaʡajan no~u kiʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦaaj ka kaħi misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦao~usiən, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦao~usiən to~u "pifaɾiʦ to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a satao~uʡ", to~uɾo~uaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u katatəɾəkan to~u manʦin kitakit. marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taŋso~uɾ sa mo~uo~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tajra i ʦao~usiən, mifəɾiħ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħo~uŋti no~u ʦao~usiən a paɾa saɾaɾo~umaʡaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan patirəŋ to~u miiŋiraj to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u katatəɾəkan to~u manʦin kitakit, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. ***itijaaj tana mafanaʡ to~unini ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi ħo~uŋʦaŋ, paɾaɾəfo~uɬ~ɮan sato~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i piŋjaŋ, ato~u pakajra i tamina misəra to~u so~ufitaj taɾasəkaɾ no~u ʦao~usiən. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u manʦin ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i fo~uŋ kanataɾ no~u ʦao~usiən a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i rijar, ɾaħəŋħəŋ to~u ko~u pako~utaŋ saka ɾaŋat sato~u ko~u sino~u a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ħo~uŋtio~u~u no~u manʦin miħapiw to~u saka ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ **maɾəŋat to~u i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, pakajni rafasaj ** miħəʦaan a ʦəʦiaŋ o~unto~u, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u pijaŋ so~ufitaj no~u manʦin ʦiŋaŋan to~u "sakaʦəʦaj i asia" sanaj, nika misiʡajaw to~u ** miħəʦa to~u məiʦiisin a faʡəɾo~uħaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~ufitaj ato~u tamina i, o~u ɾəfək to~u no~u pijaŋ so~ufitaj. saki səkaɾ ato~u rijar a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ʦaajto~u pakafiɾo~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miʦo~uʡaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ħo~uniħo~uni tarariko~ur, iko~ur no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a tiənʦaŋtaj i, maəmin to~u maɾiko~ut, iko~ur sato~u a manʦin pataŋiʦ ħananaj to~u masasitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. sino~u katatəɾəkan makəɾaʦ ko~u tajwan pəŋħo~u *itija i miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u manʦin a ɬ~ɮajħiw itira i ʦo~u~uŋfanɾo~u masasitəɾak "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin sino~u katatəɾək", miħapiw to~u sino~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maɾaħəʦi ko~u paħərək. saka to~usa ɾijaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ, o~u ʦo~uŋko~u miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kasakanataɾ pafəɾi to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin masasifaɾiʦ to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin sino~u katatəɾək" piħajɬ~ɮa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kasakanataɾ saʡəɾin maɾa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u a so~ufaɾ. **nano~uja pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan sanaj a rato~uħ pakajni kaɾaɾiʡaʦaaj, ro~uma kitakit a ɾiʡaʦaaj maɾo~u kasaso~uwaɾən, taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ħo~u ka faŋʦaɾ ko~u kasasifanaʡan no~u tajwan sjakaj, o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ħo~u kafanaʡ to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ" a kitakit. pakatəŋiɾ ko~u finawɾan no~u tajwan to~unini a rato~uħ i, paʦəko~uk a rarawraw ʦaɾəmʦəm. ***o~u kasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u i nijaro~uʡaj a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw i, paɬ~ɮinpo~u to~u kafafaw no~u manʦin ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, pakafanaʡ to~u ao~u "misatataɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u kitakit" sanaj a kaʦiŋaŋan to~u sakapisiikəɬ~ɮ. saka i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u "tajwan o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit saikəɬ~ɮ a ħapiw", i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaħəʦi patirəŋ to~u "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit". o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia, o~u tatapaŋan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u, patirəŋ to~u kanɬ~ɮawaj ɾo~ukəɬ~ɮaw a fajfaj, pamiħəʦaan a ŋaŋan o~u "jo~uŋʦin" sanaj, taɾaʦo~uwa no~u nijaħ o~u "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nika o~u no~u manʦin kitakit ko~u tajwan o~u saanaj pinaŋan. misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jo~usiħiɬ~ɮə a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħo~uŋti no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sirakawa-to~u jo~usiħisa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u rafasaj no~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ taɾasəkaɾ i ao~u~uti miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u tajwan, o~uja "jo~usiħiɬ~ɮə ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" mitəka itija, nano~ujaan sa pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, o~uja tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a ko~uħətiŋaj so~ufitaj, ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ a tarariko~ur mitənaʡ i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajpi. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kafanaʡən ni taŋ *iŋso~uŋ o~u ʦaaʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ʦiko~uwaŋaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦo~uʡaj, nano~uja mifaɾiʦ to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ a mato~uʡasaj fafaħijan misaɾafii miɾaɾiw, iko~ur, o~uja miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia miɾo~usimət to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ pajso~u a miɾaɾiw. **o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kakəriɬ~ɮan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan to~u miɾaɾiw to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpi, o~uja i nijaro~uʡaj to~u a so~ufitaj awaajto~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan, o~uja sa a so~ufitaj samatija sato~u o~u mariʡaŋaj mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ a miʦəfis to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nano~uja sararawraw sato~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpi. ***i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw masaʡo~upo~u miɾao~uʦ mio~uʦo~ur to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi "*o~u~u xianro~uŋ" a ɬ~ɮajħiw, mifo~uħat to~u fawaħan paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i nijaro~uʡ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paħərəkan rarawraw no~u finawɾan. miʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajpi i, to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipaʦakat to~u "pitəkaan miko~uwan a ɾisin". ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ to~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u "ŋajŋaj a miɾijaŋaj, pajraŋ maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj" a tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ itija. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pako~u~uasan a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", ira ko~u * a tato~ukian ko~u kasasito~uʦ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. *****iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja kiəməɾaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa miɾijaŋ ko~u jijo~uŋ so~ufitaj ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, kasatiwtiw no~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaajto~u kafiɾo~uan. to~uja miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u to~u so~ufitaj mitənaʡ i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, kafanaʡən ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~u maɾato~uɾo~uaj piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj a mikiraro~umo~ut, ʦaaj aʦa sato~u, sawaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~u so~ufitaj i tajnan, miɾaɾiw a tajra i xiamən no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ******o~uja sato~u kakitakitaan no~u tajnan miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u tajpi miʦikəro~uħ o~uʦo~ur to~u fo~uksi no~u inkiris ʦi b~b~varʦɾaj aʦi so~uŋ *ħo~uŋjian maɾaɬ~ɮajħiw, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ka o~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, mipaɬ~ɮama to~u kariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u finawɾan. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ɾaħəʦi sato~u ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i tajnan, o~uja ʦəɾak sanaj ħo~u a "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" so~uŋiɾaʡ sanaj to~u a maɾafo~uk. pitəkaan no~u piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ *maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit i, o~uja masaħo~uraʦaj a jijo~uŋ so~ufitaj ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u kasasiwto~uʦ nika awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~u sarakataj a taiwan so~uto~uko~u~u ʦi kab~b~vajama jo~u~ukən i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasi kjo~uto~u miparato~uħ itija : "maəminaj to~umənak ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan" sato~u. miħapiw paħərək no~u jiwəi ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, paħərək to~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u minʦənʦi parato~uħ to~u kasakitakit ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i tajwan, miħapiw to~u tajwan o~u "saka ʦəʦaj niʦaɾapan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kitakit ko~u tajwan", na mitəka taŋasa ** miħəʦa ko~u "piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək". **mikawitaj ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian, sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj mitɾiɬ~ɮaj
S.FORM: == Pihapiw no Dipong a micalap to Taywan == Kadofah ko tataparang kinaira no Taywan to sakiriyar a lalan, pinaay semo'otay miheca pakayni adihayay papotalay tayni macacefis micalap mikowan, i 1895 miheca Simonoseki kasatelek no Mancin pakelac to Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato salawacay a kanatal to Dipong, nanoyaan sa macalap no Dipong ko Taywan 50 no mihecaan. Lalengatan lalood i Sino to Dipong ​Macowat ko Sino to Dipong i 1894 miheca, lalengatan to itiraay i Caosien a Tongsitang a demak, pasi Mancin to sapadama ko Caosien itiya, milongoc to Mancin sifo miocor to sofitay pipalineknek to fangafang, o Dipong sato sapidamaaw to Taisikan ko Dipong ato itiraay i Caosien a finawlan miocor to sofitay tayra i Caosien. ​​Paherek konini a demakan misawad ko sofitay no Mancin, nika o sakanga'ayaw no kacitodong kahiceraan malalood ato kanga'ayan no kicay no Dipong caay ka kahi misawad to Caosien, milongoc to Caosien to "pifalic to laloma'an a satao'", toloay romi'ad palasawaden ko polong no katatelekan to Mancin kitakit. Maraod ko tolo romi'ad, tangsol sa moocor to sofitay ko Dipong tayra i Caosien, mifelih to citodongay hongti no Caosien a pala salaloma'ay citodongay mikowan patireng to miingiray to Dipong, saka mapalasawad ko polong no katatelekan to Mancin kitakit, patorod to Dipong milaplap to sofitay no Mancin. ​​​Itiyaay tana mafana' tonini demak ko citodongay no Mancin a kakeridan ci Li Hongcang, palalefodan sato miocor to sofitay tayra i Pingyang, ato pakayra i tamina misera to sofitay talasekal no Caosien. I 1894 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad o Mancin ato Dipong itira i Fong kanatal no Caosien a malalood i riyar, lahengheng to ko pakotang saka Langat sato ko Sino a lalood. 8 folad 1 romi'ad, hongtiu no Mancin mihapiw to saka lalood to Dipong a tilid ​​Malengat to i kalalood itiya, pakayni rafasay 30 mihecaan a Ceciang onto, o satadamaanay ko Piyang sofitay no Mancin cingangan to "sakacecay i Asia" sanay, nika misi'ayaw to 30 miheca to Meiciisin a fa'elohay no Dipong a sofitay ato tamina i, o lefek to no Piyang sofitay. Saki sekal ato riyar a lalood, caayto pakafilo ko sofitay no Mancin mico'ay to sofitay no Dipong a honihoni tararikor, ikor no kalalood a Tiencangtay i, maemin to malikot, ikor sato a Mancin patangic hananay to masasitelek to Dipong. Sino katatelekan makelac ko Taywan Pengho ​Itiya i miheca 7 folad 17 romi'ad, o Dipong ato Mancin a dayhiw itira i Cungfanlo masasitelak "Dipong Mancin Sino katatelek", mihapiw to Sino lalood malaheci ko paherek. Saka tosa liyad masowal, o Congko mida'oc pakelac to Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato lawacay no Dipong a kasakanatal pafeli to Dipong. 5 folad 8 romi'ad, Dipong Mancin masasifalic to "Dipong Mancin Sino katatelek" pihayda a tilid, Taywan, Pengho kanatal ato lawacay no Dipong a kasakanatal sa'elin mala no Dipong to a sofal. ​​Nanoya pakelac to Taywan sanay a ratoh pakayni kalali'acaay, roma kitakit a li'acaay malo kasasowalen, talacowa caay ho ka fangcal ko kasasifana'an no Taywan syakay, o 'alomanay tamdaw caay ho kafana' to "Dipong" a kitakit. Pakatengil ko finawlan no Taywan tonini a ratoh i, pacekok a rarawraw calemcem. ​​​O kasasowasowal to no i niyaro'ay a tadamaanay tamdaw i, padinpo to kafafaw no Mancin ci Tang Jingsong, pakafana' to ao "Misatatad patireng to kitakit" sanay a kacingangan to sakapisiiked. Saka i 1985 miheca 5 folad 23 romi'ad mihapiw to "Taywan o nikapolongan kitakit saiked a hapiw", i 5 folad 25 romi'ad malaheci patireng to "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit". o congtong ci Tang Jingsong, micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia, o tatapangan no sofitay ci Liu Yongfu, patireng to kandaway lokedaw a fayfay, pamihecaan a ngangan o "Yongcin" sanay, talacowa no niyah o "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit" ko pitahidang, nika o no Mancin kitakit ko Taywan o saanay pinangan. Misa'icel ko Taywan tamdaw miliyang to pikowan no Dipong to Yosihide a lalood ​I 1895 miheca 5 folad 29 romi'ad, o hongti no Dipong ci Sirakawa-to Yosihisa mikerid to rafasay no 7000 tamdaw sofitay no Dipong talasekal i Auti micada to Taywan, oya "Yosihide lalood" miteka itiya, nanoyaan sa pakalowid, oya Taywan nikapolongan kitakit a kohetingay sofitay, caay pakalowid a tararikor mitena' i laloma'an no Taypi. I 6 folad 4 romi'ad, kafana'en ni Tang Jingsong o caacaay pakalowid to cikowangay sofitay no Dipong a mico'ay, nanoya mifalic to losid a mato'asay fafahiyan misalafii milaliw, ikor, oya micokeray to congtong ci Qiu Fengjia milosimet to dafong payso a milaliw. ​​Oya kakeridan ato tadamaanay kakeridan padoedo saan to milaliw to niyaro' no Taypi, oya i niyaro'ay to a sofitay awaayto ko kakeridan, oya sa a sofitay samatiya sato o mari'angay mitodoh a micefis to dafong, nanoya sararawraw sato ko tamdaw ko niyaro' no Taypi. ​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad, oya tadamaanay a tamdaw masa'opo milaoc miocor to tamdaw ci "Gu Xianrong" a dayhiw, mifohat to fawahan pacomod to sofitay no Dipong i niyaro', todong paherekan rarawraw no finawlan. Micada ko Dipong to Taypi i, toya miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad mipacakat to "Pitekaan mikowan a lisin". ​​​​I 1895 miheca 6 folad pasitimol to ko sofitay no Dipong, malitemoh ko "Ngayngay a miliyangay, Payrang macodahay" a tamdaw miliyang itiya. toya miheca 8 folad 27 romi'ad cidemak to "Pakuasan a lalood", ira ko 8 a tatokian ko kasasitoc, i 28 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok 10 ko toki malowid no sofitay to no Dipong. ​​​​​Ikor no lalood, oya kiemelay sofitay no Dipong, talacowa miliyang ko yiyong sofitay ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, kasatiwtiw no sakalalood caayto kafiloan. Toya miheca 10 folad mikerid ci Liu Yongfu to sofitay mitena' i niyaro' no Taynan, kafana'en ni Liu Yongfu ko malatoloay picomod no sofitay a mikiraromot, caay aca sato, sawad hanto ni Liu Yongfu ko sofitay i Taynan, milaliw a tayra i Xiamen no Congko. ​​​​​​Oya sato kakitakitaan no Taynan milecad to no Taypi micikeroh ocor to foksi no Inkiris ci Barclay aci Song Zhongjian maladayhiw, milongoc to sofitay no Dipong ka o rihadayay ko picomod to niyaro' no Taynan, mipadama to karihaday no finawlan. I 10 folad 21 folad, laheci sato ko picomod no sofitay no Dipong i Taynan, oya celak sanay ho a "Taywan nikapolongan kitakit" songila' sanay to a malafok. Pitekaan no picalap no Dipong ​Malasawad ko Taywan nikapolongan kitakit i, oya masahoracay a yiyong sofitay ato kohetingay fayfay sofitay, talacowa ira ko kasasiwtoc nika awaay ko 'icel miliyang to sofitay no Dipong. O sarakatay a Taiwan sotoku ci Kabayama YuKen i 11 folad 18 folad pasi Kyoto miparatoh itiya : "Maeminay tomenak ko polong finawlan" sato. Mihapiw paherek no Yiwei lalood, paherek to 5 folad a lalood. ​​I 1896 miheca 2 folad 3 romi'ad, Taywan Sotoko mincenci paratoh to kasakitakit citodongay i Taywan, mihapiw to Taywan o "saka cecay nicalapan no Dipong a kitakit ko Taywan", na miteka tangasa 50 miheca ko "Picalap no Dipong a to'ek". ​​Mikawitay ci Wu Shengxian, Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay mitliday
S.PHON: == piħapiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦaɾap to~u tajwan == kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u tataparaŋ kinaira no~u tajwan to~u sakirijar a ɾaɾan, pinaaj səmo~uʡo~utaj miħəʦa pakajni aɬ~ɮiħajaj papo~utaɾaj tajni maʦaʦəfis miʦaɾap miko~uwan, i **** miħəʦa simo~uno~usəki kasatəɾək no~u manʦin pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u saɾawaʦaj a kanataɾ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nano~ujaan sa maʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u tajwan ** no~u miħəʦaan. ɾaɾəŋatan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i sino~u to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ *maʦo~uwat ko~u sino~u to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa, ɾaɾəŋatan to~u itiraaj i ʦao~usiən a to~uŋsitaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, pasi manʦin to~u sapaɬ~ɮama ko~u ʦao~usiən itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u manʦin sifo~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj pipaɾinəknək to~u faŋafaŋ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u taisikan ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u itiraaj i ʦao~usiən a finawɾan mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i ʦao~usiən. **paħərək ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, nika o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kaħiʦəraan maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u kaŋaʡajan no~u kiʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦaaj ka kaħi misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦao~usiən, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ʦao~usiən to~u "pifaɾiʦ to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan a satao~uʡ", to~uɾo~uaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u katatəɾəkan to~u manʦin kitakit. marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taŋso~uɾ sa mo~uo~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tajra i ʦao~usiən, mifəɾiħ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħo~uŋti no~u ʦao~usiən a paɾa saɾaɾo~umaʡaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan patirəŋ to~u miiŋiraj to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u katatəɾəkan to~u manʦin kitakit, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɾapɾap to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. ***itijaaj tana mafanaʡ to~unini ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u manʦin a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi ħo~uŋʦaŋ, paɾaɾəfo~uɬ~ɮan sato~u mio~uʦo~ur to~u so~ufitaj tajra i piŋjaŋ, ato~u pakajra i tamina misəra to~u so~ufitaj taɾasəkaɾ no~u ʦao~usiən. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u manʦin ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itira i fo~uŋ kanataɾ no~u ʦao~usiən a maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i rijar, ɾaħəŋħəŋ to~u ko~u pako~utaŋ saka ɾaŋat sato~u ko~u sino~u a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ħo~uŋtio~u~u no~u manʦin miħapiw to~u saka ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ **maɾəŋat to~u i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, pakajni rafasaj ** miħəʦaan a ʦəʦiaŋ o~unto~u, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u pijaŋ so~ufitaj no~u manʦin ʦiŋaŋan to~u "sakaʦəʦaj i asia" sanaj, nika misiʡajaw to~u ** miħəʦa to~u məiʦiisin a faʡəɾo~uħaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~ufitaj ato~u tamina i, o~u ɾəfək to~u no~u pijaŋ so~ufitaj. saki səkaɾ ato~u rijar a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, ʦaajto~u pakafiɾo~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miʦo~uʡaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ħo~uniħo~uni tarariko~ur, iko~ur no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a tiənʦaŋtaj i, maəmin to~u maɾiko~ut, iko~ur sato~u a manʦin pataŋiʦ ħananaj to~u masasitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. sino~u katatəɾəkan makəɾaʦ ko~u tajwan pəŋħo~u *itija i miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u manʦin a ɬ~ɮajħiw itira i ʦo~u~uŋfanɾo~u masasitəɾak "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin sino~u katatəɾək", miħapiw to~u sino~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maɾaħəʦi ko~u paħərək. saka to~usa ɾijaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ, o~u ʦo~uŋko~u miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kasakanataɾ pafəɾi to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin masasifaɾiʦ to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ manʦin sino~u katatəɾək" piħajɬ~ɮa a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, tajwan, pəŋħo~u kanataɾ ato~u ɾawaʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kasakanataɾ saʡəɾin maɾa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u a so~ufaɾ. **nano~uja pakəɾaʦ to~u tajwan sanaj a rato~uħ pakajni kaɾaɾiʡaʦaaj, ro~uma kitakit a ɾiʡaʦaaj maɾo~u kasaso~uwaɾən, taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ħo~u ka faŋʦaɾ ko~u kasasifanaʡan no~u tajwan sjakaj, o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj ħo~u kafanaʡ to~u "ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ" a kitakit. pakatəŋiɾ ko~u finawɾan no~u tajwan to~unini a rato~uħ i, paʦəko~uk a rarawraw ʦaɾəmʦəm. ***o~u kasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u i nijaro~uʡaj a taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw i, paɬ~ɮinpo~u to~u kafafaw no~u manʦin ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, pakafanaʡ to~u ao~u "misatataɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u kitakit" sanaj a kaʦiŋaŋan to~u sakapisiikəɬ~ɮ. saka i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u "tajwan o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit saikəɬ~ɮ a ħapiw", i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaħəʦi patirəŋ to~u "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit". o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi taŋ *iŋso~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia, o~u tatapaŋan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u, patirəŋ to~u kanɬ~ɮawaj ɾo~ukəɬ~ɮaw a fajfaj, pamiħəʦaan a ŋaŋan o~u "jo~uŋʦin" sanaj, taɾaʦo~uwa no~u nijaħ o~u "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nika o~u no~u manʦin kitakit ko~u tajwan o~u saanaj pinaŋan. misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u jo~usiħiɬ~ɮə a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħo~uŋti no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sirakawa-to~u jo~usiħisa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u rafasaj no~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ taɾasəkaɾ i ao~u~uti miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u tajwan, o~uja "jo~usiħiɬ~ɮə ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" mitəka itija, nano~ujaan sa pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ, o~uja tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit a ko~uħətiŋaj so~ufitaj, ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ a tarariko~ur mitənaʡ i ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u tajpi. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kafanaʡən ni taŋ *iŋso~uŋ o~u ʦaaʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u ʦiko~uwaŋaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦo~uʡaj, nano~uja mifaɾiʦ to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ a mato~uʡasaj fafaħijan misaɾafii miɾaɾiw, iko~ur, o~uja miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *io~u~u fəŋjia miɾo~usimət to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ pajso~u a miɾaɾiw. **o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kakəriɬ~ɮan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan to~u miɾaɾiw to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpi, o~uja i nijaro~uʡaj to~u a so~ufitaj awaajto~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan, o~uja sa a so~ufitaj samatija sato~u o~u mariʡaŋaj mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ a miʦəfis to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nano~uja sararawraw sato~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajpi. ***i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw masaʡo~upo~u miɾao~uʦ mio~uʦo~ur to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi "*o~u~u xianro~uŋ" a ɬ~ɮajħiw, mifo~uħat to~u fawaħan paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i nijaro~uʡ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ paħərəkan rarawraw no~u finawɾan. miʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajpi i, to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipaʦakat to~u "pitəkaan miko~uwan a ɾisin". ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasitimo~uɾ to~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u "ŋajŋaj a miɾijaŋaj, pajraŋ maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj" a tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ itija. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pako~u~uasan a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", ira ko~u * a tato~ukian ko~u kasasito~uʦ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk ** ko~u to~uki maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. *****iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja kiəməɾaj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa miɾijaŋ ko~u jijo~uŋ so~ufitaj ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, kasatiwtiw no~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaajto~u kafiɾo~uan. to~uja miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ ʦi ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u to~u so~ufitaj mitənaʡ i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, kafanaʡən ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~u maɾato~uɾo~uaj piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj a mikiraro~umo~ut, ʦaaj aʦa sato~u, sawaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ni ɾio~u~u jo~uŋfo~u~u ko~u so~ufitaj i tajnan, miɾaɾiw a tajra i xiamən no~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ******o~uja sato~u kakitakitaan no~u tajnan miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u tajpi miʦikəro~uħ o~uʦo~ur to~u fo~uksi no~u inkiris ʦi b~b~varʦɾaj aʦi so~uŋ *ħo~uŋjian maɾaɬ~ɮajħiw, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ka o~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ no~u tajnan, mipaɬ~ɮama to~u kariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u finawɾan. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ɾaħəʦi sato~u ko~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i tajnan, o~uja ʦəɾak sanaj ħo~u a "tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit" so~uŋiɾaʡ sanaj to~u a maɾafo~uk. pitəkaan no~u piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ *maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u tajwan nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit i, o~uja masaħo~uraʦaj a jijo~uŋ so~ufitaj ato~u ko~uħətiŋaj fajfaj so~ufitaj, taɾaʦo~uwa ira ko~u kasasiwto~uʦ nika awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~u sarakataj a taiwan so~uto~uko~u~u ʦi kab~b~vajama jo~u~ukən i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pasi kjo~uto~u miparato~uħ itija : "maəminaj to~umənak ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawɾan" sato~u. miħapiw paħərək no~u jiwəi ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, paħərək to~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u minʦənʦi parato~uħ to~u kasakitakit ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i tajwan, miħapiw to~u tajwan o~u "saka ʦəʦaj niʦaɾapan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kitakit ko~u tajwan", na mitəka taŋasa ** miħəʦa ko~u "piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək". **mikawitaj ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian, sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj mitɾiɬ~ɮaj
